<div class="lecture-text-container">
<p></p><p>Dear, Renegades,</p><p>I always suggest to all photographers that they learn at least some basic stuff about astrology. That magic question from the video: "What sign are you?" is only really effective if you already know some of the basics.</p><p>Start with yourself! Know all the good and bad qualities of your sign. 'Cause she's gonna ask you that for sure after she tell you hers. I've actually had some models insist knowing what sign I was before I shot with them just so they could guess my "temperament".</p><p>If you want to get a little deeper into it then at least know the signs of the people around you so if she's the same as one of them you can compare.</p><p>Don't go any deeper than that though 'cause then you seem like a freak. You're here to photographer her... Not to give her a reading.</p><p><strong>Ask further questions in the comments and I'll keep updating this module with more information.</strong></p><p><strong><em>Bronques</em></strong></p><p></p>
</div>
